simplesect.para: SYN_OK on success, SYN_INVALID_PARAM if pointers are NULL.
16-bit Statusword (0x6041), or 0 if drive is NULL.

briefdescription.para: Process new Controlword command and update drive state machine.

simplesect.para: SYN_OK on success, SYN_INVALID_PARAM if drive is NULL.
SYN_OK on success, SYN_INVALID_PARAM on invalid inputs.

briefdescription.para: Set target position for PP or CSP mode.

simplesect.para: SYN_OK on success, SYN_INVALID_PARAM if drive is NULL.

briefdescription.para: Set target velocity for PV or CSV mode.

simplesect.para: SYN_OK on success, SYN_INVALID_PARAM if drive is NULL.

briefdescription.para: Set target torque for PT or CST mode.

simplesect.para: SYN_OK on success, SYN_INVALID_PARAM if drive is NULL.

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_CiA402Drive *drive, int32_t actual_pos, int32_t actual_vel, int16_t actual_torque)
memberdef.name: syn_cia402_report_actuals

briefdescription.para: Report actual motor feedback (position, velocity, torque).

simplesect.para: SYN_OK on success, SYN_INVALID_PARAM if drive is NULL.

briefdescription.para: Trigger a fault state in the drive.

simplesect.para: SYN_OK on success, SYN_INVALID_PARAM if drive is NULL.

detaileddescription.para: Executes trajectory planning (S-Curve PP, PV ramps) and state machine updates.

simplesect.para: SYN_OK on success, SYN_INVALID_PARAM if drive is NULL.

briefdescription.para: Populate a standard CANopen Object Dictionary array with CiA 402 drive objects.

parameterdescription.para: Maximum capacity of entries array (must be >= 10).

simplesect.para: Number of entries populated, or 0 on error.

briefdescription.para: CANopen CiA 402 Servo Drive Profile Engine implementation.
